needs.title: Men 40+ Ready to Transform
needs.description: Men who are done with generic health advice and want a personalized, AI-powered system that meets them where they are.
needs.what_i_offer: A health system built around YOU — your data stays yours, your plan adapts to your life

needs.title: AI Health Coach Engineers
needs.description: Building the next generation of agent-native health coaching. Need people who understand multimodal LLMs and health domain.
needs.what_i_offer: Full access to health data pipeline + coalition membership + open architecture

needs.title: Health Content Creators
needs.description: Creators who want to reach men 40+ with quality health content through a platform that respects both creator and consumer.
needs.what_i_offer: Distribution to engaged audience + Web 4.0 protocol integration + transparent revenue sharing

needs.title: Protocol Testing Partners
needs.description: We're the first business deploying Web 4.0 protocols in production. Need feedback on what works, what breaks, what's missing.
needs.what_i_offer: Full implementation transparency + reciprocal protocol review
